title: Visible Suspicious Gravel
description: The Visible suspicious gravel texture pack for Minecraft adds frame around suspicious gravel to make it more visible
body:
![Visible Suspicious Gravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zzarty/curseforge-images/refs/heads/main/Visible_suspicious_gravel_head.png)
The Visible suspicious gravel texture pack for Minecraft will make your life easier with the updated appearance of the suspicious gravel block. This texture pack adds 1 pixel frame around gravel block, making block more visible.
